body:
I inhaled deeply, holding the smoke in my lungs, letting the warm fuzzies from what I inhaled spread through me. But the exhale didn’t follow immediately, because across from me she sat, clove cigarette in hand, but for the moment her lips were parted slightly, she set up the opportunity for me, now I just have to be willing to take it.

And goddammit it, I’m more than willing. I lean towards her, closing the distance between the two of us, my knee sliding between her legs, my lips pressed against hers, and my breath slowly flowing into her mouth, sharing a bit of myself and some my THC with the lovely girl before me. She closes her eyes, savoring what I’ve shared, both in her lungs and on her lips. As I pull away, I grin at the sweet taste of clove residue on her lips, with a twinkle in my eye.

She exhales slowly, softly, smoke gently drifting from her parted lips, and looking at me like I am a snack waiting to be devoured. The fingers on her right hand trace along my jawline, nudging my face so eyes to look deeply into her own eyes, and then slides it down so it rests on my chest, just over my heart.

And then, just a moment later, her lips are pressed against mine again, and our kisses become something insistent and impatient, like we’ve both been waiting for this opportunity far far longer than either of us is willing to admit. She pushes me down on the couch, so I fall back with her on top of me, her lips never leaving my own. The smell of her clove mixes with the scent of the joint placed to the side and forgotten, and I feel giddy and like my head is spinning, but I’m not sure whether it’s from her or the weed.

One of her hands slides into my hair, while the other cups my cheek, tilting my face as she continues to lose herself in kissing me. My chest tightens when slides over and lets her teeth gently scrape against my earlobe, sending chills through me. “Tell me this is what you want” she whispers as she releases my earlobe. My brain spins, unable to find the words to answer her, so I pull her back to to me and kiss her deep as my reply.

She slides slightly away just enough to grab the joint, watching me squirm pinned beneath her as she takes a slow drag. She smiles with a satisfied smirk as she holds the smoke for a moment, before leaning in and once again pressing her mouth against mine, slowly exhaling. The smoke flows into my mouth and I breathe in deeply, this time savoring what she’s shared with me, before releasing what’s in my lungs and looking up at her, the smoke drifting upwards, as we gaze upon each other, dazed, giggly, and with thoroughly blushing faces.

She starts to try and untangle herself from me, pushing herself up with shaky arms, but her legs betray her before she can even lift herself up to on her knees. She immediately collapses back onto me and giggles, pressing her forehead against mine. “Nope,” she whispers, her lips continuing to kiss and pull back between words, “It looks like I’m staying nice and cozy right here, where things make sense!” She melts into me me, resting her head on my chest like she’s made to fit there. I feel her breathing against me, as she lies there, a single index finger tracing my shape, both of us savoring this gentle touch.

I just hope it never ends…
